hero.desc: Trimio gives your barbershop an online booking page. No WhatsApp, no calls, no paper.

pain.title: Still managing bookings by hand?
pain.desc: Most barbershops lose customers every day for not having a system. Do you recognise this?
pain.pain1Desc: Dozens of messages a day just to book and reschedule. And some go unanswered.
pain.pain2Desc: The phone rings when you have scissors in your hand. By 10 PM you stopped answering — the client went elsewhere.
pain.pain3Desc: You don't know how much you'll earn this week, who's working, or if you have schedule space tomorrow.

howItWorks.title: Ready to run in 3 steps
howItWorks.desc: No installation needed. No tech knowledge required.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Name, services, barbers and hours. Less than 5 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Share it on Instagram, WhatsApp or wherever you like.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Clients book online — you just show up on time.

benefits.title: It's not just scheduling.
benefits.desc: Trimio is your barbershop's complete operation in one tool.
benefits.b1Desc: Clients choose service, barber, day and time — without interrupting you. Works 24 hours a day.
benefits.b2Desc: Each barber sees their schedule on their phone. You see everything in a real-time calendar view.
benefits.b3Desc: Your custom link with services, gallery and booking button. Share on Instagram and you're done.
benefits.b4Desc: Billing reports, customer history and cancellation rates — all in one panel.

1.name: Ricardo Fernandes
1.text: I used to handle bookings on WhatsApp until midnight. Now clients book by themselves whenever they want. It completely freed me up.

2.name: Diogo Almeida
2.text: I have 3 barbers and managing schedules was chaos. After 15 minutes of setup, the problem disappeared.

3.name: Carlos Mendes
3.text: Clients love being able to choose their favorite barber. No-shows dropped and Instagram comments increased.

pricing.title: Start free. Grow when you want.
pricing.desc: No contracts. Cancel whenever. No surprises.

faq.title: You have questions. We have answers.
faq.q1: Do I need to know IT or programming?
faq.a1: No. Trimio is designed for anyone. Create your account, add your services and barbers, and share the link. Typical setup takes less than 5 minutes.
faq.q2: How do clients make a booking?
faq.a2: You get a custom link (e.g. trimio.app/your-name). Share it on Instagram, WhatsApp or wherever. Clients open it, choose and book — no app, no signup.
faq.q3: Can I cancel whenever I want?
faq.a3: Yes, at any time and without penalties. There are no mandatory annual contracts. If you cancel, your plan continues until the end of the paid period.
faq.q4: What happens when I reach the free plan limit?
faq.a4: We'll warn you before you reach the limit. Once reached, clients can't make new bookings until next month or until you upgrade — all data is kept.

finalCta.title: Your barbershop online
finalCta.desc: Join the barbershops that have stopped managing bookings via WhatsApp. Start free, no credit card.
finalCta.note: Free plan forever · 30 bookings/month included · No card
